title: VerifyPermitRequest
description: Wire payload sent to POST /v1-verify-permit. Read by atlasent-api/supabase/functions/v1-verify-permit/handler.ts. Only `permit_token` is required server-side; `action_type` and `actor_id` are cross-checked when present and yield ACTION_TYPE_MISMATCH / ACTOR_MISMATCH on disagreement. The legacy {decision_id, action, agent, api_key} shape is no longer canonical — SDKs may accept legacy fields as input with a deprecation warning, but MUST always serialize to the wire shape described here.

permit_token.description: The permit_token returned by a prior /v1-evaluate call.

action_type.description: Optional cross-check — re-state the action_type. ACTION_TYPE_MISMATCH if it disagrees with the original evaluation.

actor_id.description: Optional cross-check — re-state the actor_id. ACTOR_MISMATCH if it disagrees with the original evaluation.
